name: CFmon.clmodisiceSouth30
title: MODIS Ice Topped Cloud Area Percentage
description: Percentage ice-cloud cover in optical depth categories, as seen by the MODIS instrument simulator. Dimensions of tau (optical depth) and cloud-top pressure are the same as used by clisccp output from the ISCCP satellite simulator.
processing note:
7 pressure levels x 7 optical depth levels. 
This is a regional subset of the variable. If you are producing the global equivalent of CFmon.clmodisiceSouth30, you should omit this regional South30 version.
